gazette: Official Gazette dated February 18, 2025 and nr. 32817
title: Regulation Amending the Regulation on the Manufacture, Modification and Assembly of Vehicles
bodyHtml:
Amendments have been made to some articles of the "Regulation on the Manufacture, Modification and Assembly of Vehicles", which regulates the procedures and principles regarding the granting of conformity approval to vehicles that will travel on the highway.

The article titled "Vehicle Modification for Public Transport Vehicles with Special Security Equipment" and the related Annex No. 16 have been repealed.

In renovations that are not subject to a project, a serial assembly conformity report will be prepared based on the assembly conformity report or serial assembly certificate in Article 3.2 of Annex VI of the Regulation.

According to the amendment in Article 3.2 of Annex VI titled Assembly, "serial assembly conformity report will be prepared by the company that holds the serial assembly certificate.

Provisions regarding the installation requirements of vehicle tracking system, camera system, image recorder and emergency button have been added to M1, M2 and M3 category vehicles.

Please click for the amendments.
